_description: Verified legitimate .onion sites for dark web research sweeper. Every site here has a known clearnet counterpart or is operated by a verified organization. Updated 2026-03-26.
_policy: QUARANTINE by default. All content passes through governance gate + secret scrubber before entering any training pipeline. Double-sandbox required.
_legal: Accessing .onion sites is legal. Content collection follows the same fair-use and copyright rules as surface web. No marketplace access. No illegal content.

NEWS_AND_JOURNALISM.description: Major news outlets with verified .onion mirrors. Content is the same as clearnet but accessed anonymously.

sites.name: ProPublica
sites.value: Investigative reports not indexed by standard AI training pipelines

sites.name: The New York Times
sites.purpose: News reporting accessible in censored regions
sites.value: Full news corpus accessible without geo-restrictions

sites.name: BBC News
sites.purpose: International news mirror for censored regions

WHISTLEBLOWER_PLATFORMS.description: SecureDrop instances operated by verified news organizations. Content is sensitive — governance gate required.

sites.name: SecureDrop (Guardian)
sites.purpose: Anonymous tip submission for The Guardian

ACADEMIC_AND_LIBRARIES.description: Digital libraries and academic archives on .onion. Unique content not available through standard channels.

sites.name: Imperial Library
sites.purpose: Digital book archive — thousands of academic texts
sites.value: Rare academic materials, research papers, historical texts not in standard corpora

sites.name: Z-Library (mirror)
sites.value: Academic papers and textbooks — verify copyright compliance per-item

sites.name: DuckDuckGo
sites.purpose: Privacy search engine (searches surface web via Tor)
sites.value: Entry point for Tor-based research queries

sites.name: ProtonMail
sites.value: We already use this — .onion access adds anonymity layer

sites.name: OnionShare
sites.value: Peer-to-peer secure transfer without third-party servers

sites.name: CIA
sites.purpose: Intelligence agency public information portal via Tor

sites.name: Tor Project
sites.value: Authoritative source on onion routing architecture

SEARCH_AND_INDEXING.description: Dark web search engines and indexes. Content they link to must be individually verified.

sites.name: Ahmia
sites.purpose: Tor search engine that filters illegal content
sites.value: Filtered .onion search — removes abuse material, indexes legitimate sites

sites.name: Torch
sites.value: Broadest .onion index — requires governance gate on results

NEVER_ACCESS.description: Categories that are ALWAYS blocked regardless of research purpose.
NEVER_ACCESS.detection_method: Content passes through SCBE adversarial harness + governance gate. Any content matching blocked categories triggers immediate DENY + audit log + connection termination.
